description: Rules for omitting generated package scripts. Used by extract-commands.js on every npm run extract. Add explicit pages when the book gains new sections; heuristics catch placeholders and duplicate tooling.

handlers.session-chroot-entry: run-chroot-session.sh enters chroot once for all chroot scripts
handlers.orchestrator-env: build_lfs.py exports LFS, MAKEFLAGS, and related host env
handlers.manual-disk: Partition, mkfs, mount, and fstab need real device names from the operator
handlers.manual-reboot: Interactive host logout, umount, and reboot after the build
handlers.documentation-only: Conceptual or example commands, not part of the automated build
handlers.content-heuristic: Matched an automatic content rule (see matchedRule id)

skipPages.reason: Interactive chroot login; replaced by run-chroot-session.sh
Host version-check script is maintained at repo root
export LFS / umask are set by the build driver and runners
mkfs/mkswap use book placeholders for block devices
mount/swapon use book placeholders for block devices
Bulk wget of sources is ./lfs download
lfs user .bashrc is applied via runners/lfs-user-env.sh
Package management examples (libfoo), not real installs
Host teardown and reboot are manual after build

skipPagePatterns.reason: Chroot entry page (any book edition path under chapter07/chroot.html)

contentRules.reason: Commands contain book replaceable device placeholders
Page only creates/runs version-check.sh from the book
Bulk package download via wget-list into $LFS/sources
logout and umount of $LFS virtual filesystems on the host
Tutorial package paths (libfoo) and DESTDIR examples
Only sets LFS variable and umask on the host

runAsOverrides.reason: Release files belong under the built system root, not the host /etc
